text: A street scene in an urban area, likely India, featuring a two-story building partially obscured by large trees. A person is walking across the foreground street. The building has a balcony on the upper floor. The ground floor has a dark entrance and a yellow sign on the left with Bengali script. A blue and white metal fence runs along the sidewalk. Laundry is hanging on lines near the fence. The overall atmosphere is bright and sunny.
